title: iPhone 16 Pro - Is It Worth Selling Your Kidney?

scenes.speaker: alex
scenes.text: Alright guys, the iPhone 16 Pro is here and I've been using it for two weeks. Spoiler alert. My Android friends are not going to like this video.

scenes.speaker: raj
scenes.text: Bro, it's the same phone every year! They just add one camera and charge you a thousand dollars! My Samsung does everything this phone does!

scenes.speaker: alex
scenes.text: Raj, buddy, I love you, but your Samsung crashes every time you open three apps. My iPhone has never crashed. Not once. Not even when I accidentally dropped it in the toilet.

scenes.speaker: priya
scenes.text: You dropped it in the toilet? That's disgusting, Alex! But also, how did it survive?

scenes.speaker: alex
scenes.text: IP68 water resistance, baby! Pulled it out, wiped it off, it was still playing my Spotify playlist. Try that with your OnePlus, Raj.

scenes.speaker: raj
scenes.text: Okay that's actually impressive. But what about the camera? Every phone has a good camera now.

scenes.speaker: alex
scenes.text: Good camera? GOOD camera? This thing has a 48 megapixel main sensor with 5x optical zoom! I zoomed in on my neighbor's cat from my balcony, and I could count its whiskers! This is not a phone camera, this is a spy satellite!

scenes.speaker: priya
scenes.text: Why are you spying on your neighbor's cat? That's kind of creepy, Alex.

scenes.speaker: alex
scenes.text: It's called testing, Priya. Professional testing. Anyway, the Action Button is a game changer. I set mine to open the camera instantly. No more missing moments!

scenes.speaker: raj
scenes.text: Fine fine. What about the battery? My biggest complaint with iPhones has always been the battery dying by 3 PM.

scenes.speaker: alex
scenes.text: That's the best part! The A18 Pro chip is so efficient, I'm getting seven to eight hours of screen time! I went from morning to midnight on a single charge. My power bank is literally collecting dust.

scenes.speaker: priya
scenes.text: Okay but tell them about the titanium build! That's what convinced me to switch from Android!

scenes.speaker: alex
scenes.text: Yes! Grade 5 titanium frame! This phone is lighter AND stronger than last year. I accidentally sat on it, and it didn't even flex! Meanwhile Raj's Samsung screen cracked just from a dirty look.

scenes.speaker: raj
scenes.text: That was ONE time! And I had no case on it! You know what, just tell me the price and let me cry in peace.

scenes.speaker: alex
scenes.text: Starting at 999 dollars. Yes, it's expensive. But you're getting the best camera, the best chip, the best battery life, and five years of software updates. Do the math, Raj. This phone pays for itself!

scenes.speaker: raj
scenes.text: Can someone send me the link? Don't tell anyone I asked.

scenes.speaker: alex
scenes.text: Ha! I knew it! Link in the description, folks! Smash that like button and subscribe if you want more honest tech reviews! Peace out!
